description_long: This is a robust, rectangular urban trash bin with a dark body and metallic frame, designed for public spaces such as sidewalks or parks. The front and rear panels feature a prominent circular emblem with the words 'PLEASE KEEP OUR TOWN CLEAN' encircling a stylized bell, suggesting civic pride and cleanliness. The top of the bin is slightly arched, with a recessed opening beneath a protective overhang to prevent rainwater ingress and discourage large debris. The metallic frame is angular and sturdy, providing structural support and a modern aesthetic. There are no visible handles or wheels, indicating it is intended to remain stationary. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with a likely hollow interior for waste collection.
description: A sturdy, rectangular metal trash bin with a dark body, metallic frame, and civic cleanliness emblem on the front and back. It features a recessed opening under an arched top and is designed for public urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'PLEASE KEEP OUR TOWN CLEAN' emblem and the recessed waste opening under the arched top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, dark panel and the metallic frame, with no visible opening or emblem.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, with the same emblem and recessed opening visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with a plain dark panel and metallic frame.
attribute_lid_type: arched fixed lid with recessed opening
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Circular emblem with 'PLEASE KEEP OUR TOWN CLEAN' and a bell symbol on front and rear panels
